nl_query: For each board in EVAL_IN_PROGRESS status, show the course code, total scripts, number of scripts in each evaluation status, the board coordinator name and honorarium weight, and the number of calendar days remaining until the deadline.
failed_sql: SELECT au.code AS academic_unit_code, COUNT(a.id) AS total_scripts, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_not_assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'ASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_in_progress, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'FROZEN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_frozen, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_submitted, (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN ac.cal_date BETWEEN b.created_at::DATE AND b.deadline THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM academic_calendar ac JOIN board b ON ac.academic_year = esc.academic_year WHERE ac.cal_date BETWEEN b.created_at::DATE AND b.deadline AND (ac.is_holiday = FALSE AND ac.is_weekend = FALSE) AND b.id = :board_id) AS days_remaining, bc.name AS board_coordinator_name, bc.honorarium_weight AS honorarium_weight FROM academic_unit au JOIN board b ON au.id = b.course_id JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.board_id = b.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON sa.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN board_coordinator bc ON bc.faculty_cache_id = fc.id WHERE b.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS' GROUP BY au.code, bc.name, bc.honorarium_weight ORDER BY au.code, days_remaining DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: board_coordinator does NOT have name. Join to faculty_cache: faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = bc.faculty_cache_id, then use fc.name.
